# Table of Contents

- [Prologue](../index.qmd)

## Part I: Building Blocks

- [Geographic Thinking for Data Scientists](01_geo_thinking.qmd)
- [Geospatial Computational Environment](02_geospatial_computational_environment.qmd)
- [Spatial data](03_spatial_data.qmd)
- [Spatial weights](04_spatial_weights.qmd)

## Part II: Spatial Data Analysis

- [Choropleth Mapping](05_choropleth.qmd)
- [Spatial Autocorrelation](06_spatial_autocorrelation.qmd)
- [Local Spatial Autocorrelation](07_local_autocorrelation.qmd)
- [Point Pattern Analysis](08_point_pattern_analysis.qmd)

## Part III: Advanced Topics

- [Spatial Inequality](09_spatial_inequality.qmd)
- [Clustering and Regionalization](10_clustering_and_regionalization.qmd)
- [Spatial Regression](11_regression.qmd)
- [Spatial Feature Engineering](12_feature_engineering.qmd)

## Endmatter

- [References](references.qmd)
